recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
recommendations.overview: Picking up after the events of Never Back Down 2, former MMA champion Case Walker is on the comeback trail to become champion once again.

recommendations.title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
recommendations.overview: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under an ex MMA rising star and then ultimately have to fight each other and the traitor in their midst.

recommendations.title: The Conference
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group of public sector employees battle not only their own discord but also a bloodthirsty killer during a seemingly innocuous retreat.

recommendations.title: Against the Dark
recommendations.overview: When most of the population of Earth is infected by a virus and transformed into flesh eaters and blood drinking creatures, a group of hunters lead by Tao and his sword chase the vampire zombies to eliminate them. Six non-infected survivors try to fi

recommendations.title: 28 Days Later
recommendations.overview: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus

recommendations.title: Alien Raiders
recommendations.overview: It's the end of yet another night at Hastings Supermarket, a grocery store in Buck Lake, Arizona. But just before closing, a group of masked and armed to the teeth militants invades the store and take everyone hostage

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

recommendations.title: Lamp Life
recommendations.overview: Bo Peep explains what happened to herself and her sheep between the events of Toy Story 2 and Toy Story 4.

recommendations.title: Cold Storage
recommendations.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.
